xmldoc.stdout:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--CLEAN-->
  <Command Name="clean" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="DotNetTips.Spargine.Dev.Tool.CleanCommand" 
Settings="DotNetTips.Spargine.Dev.Tool.CleanCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Clean temp and cached files generated by Visual Studio, SQL 
Server and more</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="af,addfolder" Value="FOLDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Add folder to clean</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="rf,removefolder" Value="FOLDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Remove folder to clean</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="turbobackup" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[System.Boolean, System.Private.CoreLib, 
Version=8.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]">
        <Description>Turbo Backup: Backs up changed files</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="VERBOSITY" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="DotNetTips.Spargine.Dev.Tool.Verbosity">
        <Description>Set the verbosity level. Allowed values are q[grey]uiet[/],
m[grey]inimal[/], n[grey]ormal[/], d[grey]etailed[/], and 
diag[grey]nostic[/]</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="clean" />
      <Example commandLine="clean" />
      <Example commandLine="--turbobackup" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--BACKUP-->
  <Command Name="backup" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="DotNetTips.Spargine.Dev.Tool.BackupCommand" 
Settings="DotNetTips.Spargine.Dev.Tool.BackupCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Backup code of Visual Studio solutions</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="af,addfolder" Value="FOLDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Add folder to clean</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="cleanprojects" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[System.Boolean, System.Private.CoreLib, 
Version=8.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]">
        <Description>Removes obj and bin folders from projects.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="rf,removefolder" Value="FOLDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Remove folder to clean</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="turbo" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[System.Boolean, System.Private.CoreLib, 
Version=8.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]">
        <Description>Turbo Mode: Backs up changed files</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="VERBOSITY" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="DotNetTips.Spargine.Dev.Tool.Verbosity">
        <Description>Set the verbosity level. Allowed values are q[grey]uiet[/],
m[grey]inimal[/], n[grey]ormal[/], d[grey]etailed[/], and 
diag[grey]nostic[/]</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="backup" />
      <Example commandLine="backup" />
      <Example commandLine="--turbo" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
</Model>
